prompt: A full-page manga-style parody character profile illustration on an aged off-white paper background, designed like a JoJo-inspired stand user sheet with bold ink lines, cross-hatching, dramatic posing, and stylized Japanese text. The central figure is an anthropomorphic duck mascot athlete standing in a confident forward stride, pointing directly at the viewer with one gloved hand and clenching the other fist. He has a large round pale-yellow duck head with a bright orange beak, huge glossy black eyes, and a fierce determined expression with furrowed brows. His body is human-like and athletic, wearing a dark green sleeveless soccer jersey over a white undershirt, white shorts, black shoes with teal laces, and yellow-and-black horizontal striped knee-high socks. Around his neck hangs a lanyard with an ID badge showing a small portrait icon of the duck mascot and the text “No.001”. The jersey has 4 visible sponsor-style patches and labels: “農協牛乳”, “今野硝子工業”, “相模福祉村”, and a small crest marked “SC'S”. Behind him stands his humanoid Stand, a tall muscular armored figure with a metallic olive-gold body, a heart-shaped chest emblem, narrow intimidating eyes, and a raised fist, surrounded by jagged purple spiritual flames. Add 4 large purple manga sound effect texts around the figures, each reading “ゴゴ…”, with one near the upper left of the Stand and 3 stacked vertically along the left side of the mascot. On the left side of the page, include a profile text column with 6 horizontal rule-separated lines of Japanese text: “スタンド使い名: ガミティ”, “性別: 男”, “見た目: ダチョウのマスコット”, “年齢: 不明”, “身長: 175cm”, and “職業: マスコット / PR活動”. On the right side, place a large spiky speech bubble filled with bold vertical Japanese text: “オラオラオラオラオラ！ 前に出るぞ！絶対に負けねェーッ！ 相模原・共に行こうぜェーッ！”. Below that, add a lower-right information block with a heading “スタンド名:『オオサガミ・オオオォ！』” and a smaller subtitle “(SC相模原チャント「オオサガミオオオォー！」より)”, followed by a paragraph headed “スタンド能力:” describing an emotional amplification power in dense Japanese body text. In the lower left corner, include a purple-filled radar chart with 6 axes labeled in Japanese: “破壊力 B”, “スピード B”, “射程距離 D”, “成長性 C”, “精密動作性 C”, and “持続力 C”. Composition should feel like a dramatic manga magazine character introduction page, with the mascot in front, the Stand looming behind, strong foreshortening, dynamic comic-book energy, and a humorous contrast between a cute sports mascot and an overwhelmingly serious supernatural battle presentation.
